metadata.description: claude code plugins, hooks, agents, skills, and mine — everything tested

plugins.name: mine
plugins.description: mines every claude code session into a local sqlite database. tracks costs, tools, errors, subagents, and enables full-text search across your history.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: saves your context before claude compresses it. the one hook everyone needs

plugins.name: broadcast
plugins.description: async notifications when claude ships something. slack, discord, wherever — fire and forget
